'''Cloud''' was one of the four members of [[Unit Aurek-Seven]] of the [[501st Legion (Empire of the Hand)|501st Legion]] in the [[Empire of the Hand]]. The Unit consisted of [[Jorm Whistler Mackenni|Twister]], [[Shadow (stormtrooper)|Shadow]], [[Watchman (stormtrooper)|Watchman]], and Cloud.

==Biography==
====Overthrowing a Warlord====
He aided the [[Eickarie]]s in the [[liberation of Kariek]] from [[the Warlord]] who had taken over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. After breaching the fortress with the help of a resistance group lead by [[Su-mil]] through an unknown entryway, Cloud was sent back to request reinforcements. They aided the Eickaries in freeing the Warlords [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] as Twister had promised. Cloud led a group of Eickarie resistance soldiers and prisoners to assist the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] trying to gain access to the fortress through the tunnels.

====The Rediscovery of ''Outbound Flight''====
Later, in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], Cloud accompanied [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Chak Fel]] aboard the ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' to [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]] along with the rest of Unit Aurek-Seven as a guard detail for the commander. Cloud also participated in the [[Battle of the Redoubt]] helping [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] Skywalker in securing the remains of [[Outbound Flight Project|''Outbound Flight'']] against the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]]. Following the battle, Commander Fel led the Unit to join [[Prard'ras'kleoni|General Drask]]'s [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] task force to Vagaari [[Realspace/Legends|space]].
